task_description: Phase 5 - Combat Polish + Sound + Save: Implement QTE boss events, procedural 8-bit sound system, and save/meta-progression system for the Plague of Danjin roguelike

verification.summary: Clean build (./gradlew classes) passes with all 3 features implemented and review issues addressed. No test suite exists in this project. No Docker configuration.

issues_addressed: Issue 1: QTE thresholds now use percentage-based calculation from enemy.getMaxHp() instead of hardcoded HP values, correctly accounting for Shatter modifier
Issue 2: Added setHp(int) to GameCharacter; CombatEngineRestorer now accurately restores HP below max
Issue 3: MetaProgression turn counter now increments on SPELL_CAST events in addition to PLAYER_BASIC_ATTACK
Issue 4: SoundGenerator.createSound() uses try-finally to ensure temp WAV file cleanup on failure
Issue 5: parseStringList() in both SaveData and MetaProgression now uses balanced-bracket counting with string-awareness to handle brackets in string values
Issue 6: Added documentation on MusicManager class javadoc about Sound.loop() platform duration limits (~10s)
Issue 7: MetaProgression is now persisted at wave transitions alongside run save to prevent data loss on crash
Issue 8: Already properly handled - GameScreen.hide() removes all listeners when transitioning to QTEScreen/SkillChoiceScreen, preventing accumulation
